narrative.narrative: Fear & Greed at 25 signals peak capitulation, while stablecoin growth shows sidelined capital quietly accumulating—mirroring the August 2024 bottom formation. With BTC holding above $63K in a risk-off regime, the setup echoes the quiet accumulation phase that preceded the last major reversal.
narrative.headline: Fear Grips, But Smart Money Loads Up

consensus.key_reasoning: The Fear & Greed score of 25 anchors the phase in Panic (24-31), and the strong 80% pattern match to the August 2024 accumulation bottom with growing stablecoin reserves suggests smart money is quietly positioning for a reversal. However, with six diverging momentum and flow factors still unresolved, the prudent call is CAUTION rather than an aggressive long until the divergence narrows.
disagreements_noted: Analyst calls Anxiety (score 39-46 band) while the live Fear & Greed score of 25 actually sits in the Panic band (24-31), making Panic the ladder-legal call
Analist leans CAUTION/RISK_OFF with 0.62 confidence while Narrative Writer is more bullish with 0.80 confidence framing this as an accumulation bottom
Analyst flags 6 diverging factors (ETF flows, MVRV z-score, VIX, BTC momentum, dominance fade, funding) while Narrative Writer treats the setup as a coherent bottom formation
